steps.title: Identify the Key Contrast
steps.content: ”Its role isn't ____; rather, it actively supports diving mechanisms” creates a contrast. The blank must describe the opposite of active engagement.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content:
Latent means dormant or hidden—not actively visible or expressed.

If the spleen's role “isn't latent,” it's actively expressed and engaged, matching “actively support diving mechanisms.” The other three choices describe unrelated concepts (replicable, predetermined) or create logical confusion (operative means functioning, which would contradict rather than contrast with active support).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
